title: Cleistesiopsis bifaria
uses: Cleistesiopsis bifaria, also known as the variable rain-kirk, is a species of orchid native to North America. Research on the plant's medicinal uses is limited, but it has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal applications.
